case_title: MICHAEL T. MC CORMICK VS. MARIA TERESA FEREIRA

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR NULLITY FILED BY PETITIONER MC CORMICK, MICHAEL T. AS TO RESPONDENT FEREIRA, MARIA TERESA SUMMONS ISSUED AND FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO ENTER NUNC PRO TUNC JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER MC CORMICK, MICHAEL T.
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT OR UNCONTESTED DISSOLUTION OR LEGAL SEPARATION FILED BY PETITIONER MC CORMICK, MICHAEL T.

JUDITH HARDING WITH PETITIONER. N/A BY RESPONDENT. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SIGNED STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PETITIONER WAS PLACED UNDER OATH & VOIR DIRED BY HIS ATTORNEY ON THE ISSUE OF FRAUD FOR THE NULLITY OF MARRIAGE. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING THE COURT GRANTED PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A NULLITY OF THE MARRIAGE. COURT FINDS RESPONDENT DEFRAUDED PETITIONER, AND HER (RESPONDENT'S) SOLE PURPOSE TO ENTER THE MARRIAGE WAS TO GAIN RESIDENCY & U.S. CITIZENSHIP. NULLITY OF MARRIAGE ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC TO DECEMBER 31, 2001. NULLITY WAS SUBMITTED TO & SIGNED BY THE COURT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE FILED & MAILED TO THE PARTIES FORTHWITH. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA, CSR #5153.
JUDGMENT ON NULLITY - MARITAL STATUS ENDS: N/A - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY PETITIONER MC CORMICK, MICHAEL T.
INITIAL FILING FEE OF $203.00 PAID BY PETITIONER ON 10/12/01
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS FILED BY PETITIONER MC CORMICK, MICHAEL T.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT AS TO RESPONDENT
JGMT CKLI NOT SIGNED, DECL RE: NULLITY NEEDED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFAULT HEARING HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- MARJORIE A. SLABACH
